Bash(python - <<'EOF'
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import sys
import io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)

df = pd.read_csv\('data_MRPL_NS_15m_20260312_1442.csv'\)
df['Datetime'] = pd.to_datetime\(df['Datetime']\)

df['Vol20Avg'] = df['Volume'].rolling\(20\).mean\(\)
df['VolRatio'] = df['Volume'] / df['Vol20Avg']

last = df.iloc[-1]
print\("=== VOLUME ANALYSIS: MRPL ==="\)
print\(f"Last close: Rs.{last['Close']:.2f}"\)
print\(f"Last candle volume: {int\(last['Volume']\):,}"\)
print\(f"20-bar avg volume:  {int\(last['Vol20Avg']\):,.0f}"\)
print\(f"Volume ratio: {last['VolRatio']:.2f}x"\)

vol10 = df['Volume'].iloc[-10:]
vol_trend = "INCREASING" if vol10.iloc[-1] > vol10.iloc[0] else "DECREASING"
print\(f"\\nVolume trend \(last 10 candles\): {vol_trend}"\)

price_chg = df['Close'].iloc[-1] - df['Close'].iloc[-5]
vol_chg = df['Volume'].iloc[-1] - df['Volume'].mean\(\)
if price_chg > 0 and vol_chg > 0:
    pv_rel = "ACCUMULATION \(price up, volume up\)"
elif price_chg < 0 and vol_chg > 0:
    pv_rel = "DISTRIBUTION \(price down, volume up\)"
elif price_chg > 0 and vol_chg < 0:
    pv_rel = "WEAK RALLY \(price up, volume low\)"
else:
    pv_rel = "WEAK DECLINE \(price down, volume low\)"
print\(f"Price-Volume: {pv_rel}"\)

print\("\\nVolume spikes \(>2x avg\) in last 20 candles:"\)
spikes = df.iloc[-20:][df.iloc[-20:]['VolRatio'] > 2.0]
if len\(spikes\) > 0:
    for _, row in spikes.iterrows\(\):
        direction = "UP" if row['Close'] > row['Open'] else "DOWN"
        print\(f"  {row['Datetime']} | Vol: {int\(row['Volume']\):,} \({row['VolRatio']:.1f}x\) | {direction} | Close: Rs.{row['Close']:.2f}"\)
else:
    print\("  No spikes > 2x avg in last 20 candles"\)

# OBV
df['OBV'] = 0
for i in range\(1, len\(df\)\):
    if df['Close'].iloc[i] > df['Close'].iloc[i-1]:
        df.loc[df.index[i], 'OBV'] = df['OBV'].iloc[i-1] + df['Volume'].iloc[i]
    elif df['Close'].iloc[i] < df['Close'].iloc[i-1]:
        df.loc[df.index[i], 'OBV'] = df['OBV'].iloc[i-1] - df['Volume'].iloc[i]
    else:
        df.loc[df.index[i], 'OBV'] = df['OBV'].iloc[i-1]
obv_trend = "RISING \(Bullish\)" if df['OBV'].iloc[-1] > df['OBV'].iloc[-10] else "FALLING \(Bearish\)"
print\(f"\\nOBV: {obv_trend}"\)
print\(f"OBV now: {int\(df['OBV'].iloc[-1]\):,} | 10 bars ago: {int\(df['OBV'].iloc[-10]\):,}"\)

today = df[df['Datetime'].dt.date == pd.Timestamp\('2026-03-12'\).date\(\)]
today_vol = today['Volume'].sum\(\)
typical_day_vol = df.groupby\(df['Datetime'].dt.date\)['Volume'].sum\(\).mean\(\)
print\(f"\\nToday volume so far: {int\(today_vol\):,}"\)
print\(f"Typical day volume:  {int\(typical_day_vol\):,}"\)
print\(f"Today vs avg: {today_vol/typical_day_vol:.2f}x"\)

ratio = last['VolRatio']
conviction = "HIGH" if ratio >= 1.5 else "MEDIUM" if ratio >= 1.0 else "LOW"
print\(f"\\nVolume conviction: {conviction} \({ratio:.2f}x avg\)"\)
EOF)

Bash(python - <<'EOF'
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)

# Signal synthesis
current = 191.35
entry_low  = round\(current * 0.998, 2\)
entry_high = round\(current * 1.002, 2\)
t1 = 197.49
t2 = 198.30
stop = 188.10
risk   = current - stop
reward = t1 - current
rr = reward / risk

print\(f"Entry zone:  Rs.{entry_low} - Rs.{entry_high}"\)
print\(f"T1: Rs.{t1}  T2: Rs.{t2}"\)
print\(f"Stop: Rs.{stop}"\)
print\(f"Risk: Rs.{risk:.2f}  Reward: Rs.{reward:.2f}  R:R: 1:{rr:.2f}"\)
EOF)
